This makes production self-healing: a stale `IVX_AI_GATEWAY_URL` env var on Render can no longer re-route the AI runtime through Rork.
- `expo/metro.config.js` — removed `withRorkMetro` + `@rork-ai/toolkit-sdk` import; now plain `getDefaultConfig`.
- `expo/scripts/verify-expo-sdk.mjs` — removed Rork SDK presence gate (SDK absence is desired state).
- `render.yaml` — removed `RORK_TOOLKIT_SECRET_KEY` + `EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_TOOLKIT_SECRET_KEY` env var declarations.

- `toolkit.rork.com` runtime calls in web bundle: ZERO (grep verified)
- `api.rork.com` runtime calls in web bundle: ZERO (grep verified)
- `RorkAnalyticsProvider` + PostHog relay: PURGED from rebuilt web bundle
- `EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_*` read by client code: no longer read at runtime

**OWNER_AI_PROVIDER:** Vercel AI Gateway (`AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY` → `ai-gateway.vercel.sh`) → OpenAI direct → Anthropic direct. Rork removed. Live test PASSED — returned IVX IA identity reply.

**PUBLIC_AI_PROVIDER:** Same IVX-owned chain. Live test PASSED — 732-char IVXHOLDINGS answer.

**CAPITAL_NETWORK_STATUS:**

**IOS_STATUS:** PASS — build succeeded, installable artifacts created

**GITHUB_SHA:** `18c1525644a06cda504d506122595dc977909723`

**LIVE_HEALTH:** `https://api.ivxholding.com/health` → 200, healthy, commit `18c15256`, `aiEndpoint: https://ai-gateway.vercel.sh/v3/ai/openai/gpt-4o`, `rorkInEndpoint: false`
**LIVE_VERSION:** commit `18c15256`, bootTime `2026-07-07T03:24:38Z`, GitHub matches production

**BLOCKERS:**
1. `EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_*` env vars still injected by Rork sandbox (auto-managed, cannot be removed from sandbox; no client code reads them at runtime)
2. `@rork-ai/toolkit-sdk` still in `expo/package.json` (Rork sandbox blocks package.json edits; but zero source imports + metro doesn't use it = dead dependency, no runtime usage)
